feedback.text: Many modern video game titles require an always-online connection, even for solo play. When servers are shut down, these games become unplayable, essentially destroying legally purchased products. Some companies even demand the destruction of physical copies when service ends. This is anti consumer and a concern of many other EU citizens as seen in the Stop Destroying Videogames petition. Games that dont rely on online features should remain playable indefinitely. To this day over 300 video games, that where sold to customers are already unplayable. Preserve digital ownership and stop practices that kill games unnecessarily. Thanks for reading.
